content.speakerText: Well, I should let you get back to your meeting.
content.speakerTextCn: 我就不打扰你回去开会了。

options.text: Thanks for the chat, Alex. Have a great day!

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Thanks for the chat, Alex. Have a great day!' 是礼貌、温暖且符合职场语境的道别方式。选项2虽然礼貌但不够具体和温暖；选项3和4语气生硬、不礼貌，不符合‘礼貌道别’场景的核心要求。

content.speakerText: I've got to run, but it was really nice talking with you.
content.speakerTextCn: 我得走了，但和你聊天真的很愉快。

options.text: Same here! Let’s grab coffee next week.
Why are you leaving so early?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Same here! Let’s grab coffee next week.' 表达了积极回应并主动提议未来联系，符合礼貌道别中的‘建立联系’原则。选项2语气冷漠，选项3和4违背了积极结束对话的社交礼仪。

content.speakerText: It’s been great catching up. I should go now.
content.speakerTextCn: 很高兴和你聊了这么多，我该走了。

options.text: You too! Take care and stay in touch.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'You too! Take care and stay in touch.' 是温暖、自然且包含情感回馈的道别方式。选项2语气冷漠，选项3转移话题，选项4表达负面情绪，均不符合礼貌道别的语用规范。

content.template: Thanks for the chat, Alex. Have a ___ day!
content.hint: 这是最温暖、最常用的道别表达之一，���调积极情感
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：have a great day（礼貌道别高频搭配）

content.template: I really enjoyed our conversation. Let's ___ soon!
content.hint: 表达期待未来联系时的正式且自然的动词
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：connect（用于正式或半正式语境中表示保持联系）

content.template: It was wonderful seeing you. ___ care and have a wonderful day!
content.hint: 这是一个固定搭配，常用于道别时表达关心
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：take care（道别时表达关心的惯用语）

content.speakerText: Well, I should let you get back to your meeting.
content.speakerTextCn: 我就不打扰你回去开会了。
expectedAnswers: Thanks for the chat! Have a great day!
Same to you — looking forward to our next talk!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否得体回应了对方的道别意图，没有继续占用对方时间
语言准确性：语法正确，无明显错误，使用了恰当的道别短语
表达自然度：语气友好、不生硬，符合英语母语者的日常表达习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了至少一个场景关键词如 'have a great day', 'talk soon', 'looking forward'

content.speakerText: I’ve got to head out now — it was great catching up!
content.speakerTextCn: 我得走了，很高兴和你聊了这么多！
expectedAnswers: You too! Take care and stay in touch!
Same here! Let’s plan something soon.
Thanks for the time — have a wonderful day!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应了对方的道别，并传递了友好情绪
语言准确性：使用了正确的搭配（如 take care, stay in touch），无语法错误
表达自然度：语调自然，避免机械背诵，有情感投入
关键词覆盖：是否使用了至少两个场景关键词如 'take care', 'stay in touch', 'have a wonderful day'

content.speakerText: It’s been a pleasure talking with you. I should go now.
content.speakerTextCn: 和你聊天非常愉快，我该走了。
expectedAnswers: The pleasure was mine! Let’s not let too much time pass before we connect again.
Absolutely — have a fantastic day and I’ll message you soon!
Thanks so much! Looking forward to our next coffee.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否以积极、温暖的方式结束对话，强化了人际关系
语言准确性：使用了高级表达如 'the pleasure was mine', 'let’s not let too much time pass'
表达自然度：语句流畅，符合母语者在正式或半正式场合的表达习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了至少一个高级道别短语如 'the pleasure was mine', 'looking forward', 'connect again'
